title: Most news apps treat everyone the same, but that doesn't make sense.
body:
When we built Headlinne, we wanted to solve a specific problem. Most readers are tired of scrolling through endless feeds of news that just does not matter to them. We realized that personalization is not about guessing what you want based on vague demographics. It is about understanding what you actually read.

Our recommendation engine works by paying attention to your habits. It learns from the topics you engage with and the stories you finish. Instead of pushing generic headlines, it starts to prioritize the subjects you follow closely. Over time, it gets better at filtering out the noise so you only see what is relevant to your interests.

We believe technology should work for you, not the other way around. It is not about keeping you glued to a screen for hours. It is about helping you stay informed in a way that feels efficient and personal.
cta: If you want to see how this approach changes your daily reading, you can try it out at HEADLINNE.com.
